imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Circular globe logo with gold ring and navy line art, with the wordmark 'UNICO' and subtitle 'GLOBAL TRADE & EXCELLENCE' centered below on a clean white background (unico-logo-new.dim_512x512.png)

## Edit Images
- Replace the existing header logo asset with the new provided logo (1000035744.jpeg.dim_512x512.png > unico-logo-new.dim_512x512.png)

existing_features.title: Add the user-provided new logo (from the uploaded WhatsApp images) as a static asset under frontend/public/assets/generated, and update the header logo in frontend/src/App.tsx to use this new logo file instead of the current /assets/generated/1000035744.jpeg.dim_512x512.png.

new_feature_requests.summary: Replace the site/app logo with the user-provided new logo image
